title: serratula varia
intro: Serratula varia, also known as red clover or serradella, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, which help to soothe coughs and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Serratula varia include reducing the severity of menopausal symptoms, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting the immune system. Serratula varia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies and supplements to promote overall well-being.
